# QB Continuity Experiment

*Generated by `sportslab qb-continuity` (v2.0.0, 2026-06-23)*

## Executive Summary

Incumbent holdout (2025) LL: **0.6262**

Tests 5 QB-continuity feature variants against the incumbent on rolling all-season simulation and fitted-once holdout. No model is promoted in this research pass.

## Model Variants

| Label | Features | Live Safety | Description |
|-------|----------|-------------|-------------|
| incumbent | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | research_oracle | Incumbent: qb_changed + rolling_mov_3 |
| no_qb | home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | live_safe_no_qb | No-QB fallback: rolling_mov_3 only |
| qb_minimal | home_qb_changed, away_qb_changed, home_new_qb_flag, away_new_qb_flag, home_rolling_mov_3, away_rolling_mov_3 | research_oracle | QB continuity minimal: qb_changed + new_qb_flag + rolling_mov_3 |
| qb_experience | 7 features | research_oracle | QB continuity experience: qb_changed + starts + rolling_mov_3 |
| qb_recovery | 7 features | research_oracle | QB continuity recovery: qb_changed + games_since + rolling_mov_3 |
| qb_full_small | 16 features | research_oracle | QB continuity full-small: all QB features + rolling_mov_3 |

## Rolling Simulation (All Seasons)

| Model | Log Loss | Brier | Accuracy | Games | Δ vs Incumbent |

| incumbent | 0.6487 | 0.2282 | 0.6329 | 1373 | — |

| qb_full_small | 0.6585 | 0.2316 | 0.6198 | 1373 | +0.0098 |

### Bootstrap CI vs Incumbent (Rolling, 1000 iterations)

Δ = challenger LL − incumbent LL. Negative Δ means challenger better.

| Challenger | Mean Δ | 95% CI Lower | 95% CI Upper |
|------------|--------|--------------|--------------|
| no_qb | 0.0021 | -0.0053 | 0.0096 |
| qb_minimal | 0.0018 | -0.0011 | 0.0047 |
| qb_experience | -0.0028 | -0.0115 | 0.0061 |
| qb_recovery | 0.0019 | -0.0055 | 0.0092 |
| qb_full_small | 0.0098 | -0.0033 | 0.0234 |

## Confidence Buckets

Confidence = 2 × |prob − 0.5|. Higher = more confident.

## Live-Safety Labels

All QB features in this experiment are computed from oracle (final actual starter) data. They are `research_oracle` unless the user supplies a pregame QB input CSV through the auditable QB input workflow (`sportslab predict-future --qb-input`).

| Label | Meaning |
|-------|--------|
| research_oracle | Uses final actual starter from nflreadpy schedule. Not live-safe unless overridden.
| live_safe_no_qb | Uses only rolling_mov_3. No QB dependency. Always live-safe.
| live_safe_if_qb_input_available | Uses QB starter identity. Live-safe only if pregame QB input CSV is provided.

## Recommendation

**No model is promoted in this research pass.**

Best challenger on rolling: **qb_experience** (0.6459, Δ=-0.0028 [-0.0115, 0.0061]).

1. **Does any QB-continuity variant beat the incumbent in rolling all-season simulation?** Yes.
2. **Does any QB-continuity variant beat the incumbent in fitted-once 2025?** Yes.
3. **Does any QB-continuity variant materially improve QB-change games?** See subset table above.
4. **Does the improvement survive bootstrap uncertainty?** Check CI intervals above.
5. **Should the live default change?** No. Continue with incumbent (oracle) or no-QB fallback (live).

---
*Incumbent: v2.0.0, 0.6262 holdout LL. No model promoted in this pass.*
